name: Learnosity Assessment
blurb: Assessment items on the Learnosity platform.
examplePrompt: Create an ordered list assessment of the top 5 GDP countries in descending order

name: Spreadsheet
blurb: Structured, embeddable spreadsheets with live formulas.
examplePrompt: A monthly budget spreadsheet with labeled income and expense rows, a SUM total, and a remaining-balance cell that updates live.

name: Concept Web
examplePrompt: Make a concept web assessment with draggable concepts and relations about the water cycle

name: Data Pipeline
blurb: Fetch JSON or CSV from the web and reshape it with a filter, group, join, and sort pipeline.
examplePrompt: Fetch population data from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/samayo/country-json/master/src/country-by-population.json and filter the top 10 largest populations

name: Charts
blurb: Declarative charts compiled to Apache ECharts — bar, line, pie, donut, and more.
examplePrompt: A combo chart titled 'Quarterly Revenue & Growth' with eight quarters on the x-axis (Q1–Q4 2024, then Q1–Q4 2025). Revenue as vertical bars (thousands): 120, 150, 170, 210, 240, 230, 290, 340. A smooth line on a secondary y-axis shows quarter-over-quarter growth percent: 0, 25, 13, 24, 14, -4, 26, 17. Label the left axis 'Revenue ($K)' and the right axis 'Growth (%)'. Include a legend, value labels on the bars, light gridlines, and a clean modern theme.
